hero.label: BRAND_NAME / VOL.01 / SS26
hero.lede: A new collectible for the riders, runners, and dreamers. Posable practice tools that live in your bag, on your desk, and in your kit. Snowboard first. Every sport next.

marquee.items: POSABLE / CARRYABLE / COLLECTIBLE / POSABLE / CARRYABLE / COLLECTIBLE /

manifesto.label: MANIFESTO
manifesto.title: We are making the figures athletes wished they had as kids.
manifesto.body1: Fifteen years ago, two snowboarders in Bergen, Norway built articulated figures out of cardboard and duct tape to study tricks they couldn't yet land. They turned it into a company called Tech Rider, made a few hundred figures for Terje, Tadashi, Travis, and Helgason, and then disappeared in 2011.
manifesto.body2: We are not bringing them back. We are taking what they got right — the obsessive, posable, athlete-rendered figure — and giving it the cultural weight it always deserved. Original characters. Multi-sport. Built to carry, built to pose, built to collect.
manifesto.body3: For the kid who taped sequences on the wall. For the rider who studies frames before they sleep. For everyone who knows that movement is a language.

characters.label: CHARACTERS / WAVE I
characters.title: We don't sell signatures. We sell archetypes.
characters.subtitle: Each character is the spirit of a discipline — never the likeness of a single athlete. Collect the series; rotate the kit; pose the moment.

powder.name: The Powder Hunter
powder.tagline: Lives where the lift line ends.

park.name: The Park Rat
park.tagline: Switch in, switch out, no flat ground.

halfpipe.name: The Halfpipe Specialist
halfpipe.tagline: Wall to wall is a whole language.

purist.name: The Backcountry Purist
purist.tagline: Earns every line, leaves no trace.

sports.label: ROADMAP
sports.title: One brand. Every discipline that has a culture.
sports.subtitle: The mechanism is universal. The cultures are infinite. We start where the founders breathe — and walk into every sport that has a tribe.

tech.label: TECHNOLOGY
tech.title: Fourteen articulated joints. A tendon at every knee. Stands like it means it.
tech.body: Each figure is engineered around a fully articulated armature with elastic tension at the knees — a 1990s Norwegian invention, now public domain, refined for 2026. Cloth costumes, real boards, sculpted heads, 10-15 stable poses per figure.

sizes.label: TWO SCALES
sizes.kicker: One character. Two sizes. Three jobs.
sizes.title: The display piece, and the one that lives in your bag.

mini.name: MINI CHARM
mini.for: Bag. Desk. Pocket. Always with you.

signup.label: PRE-LAUNCH
signup.title: Get the drop alert.
signup.subtitle: First wave is limited and numbered. Sign up to get the launch link before it goes public — and the founders' letter, just for you.
signup.fine: We email twice before launch and never share your address.
